# Vendored web assets

The embedded admin UI serves these files locally so production environments do not depend on public CDNs at runtime.

- Vue `3.5.13`
  - Source: `https://unpkg.com/vue@3.5.13/dist/vue.global.prod.js`
  - License: MIT, stored at `vendor/vue/LICENSE`
- Axios `1.7.9`
  - Source: `https://unpkg.com/axios@1.7.9/dist/axios.min.js`
  - License: MIT, stored at `vendor/axios/LICENSE`
